documentation:
## Aliyun ROS CLOUDSTORAGEGATEWAY Construct Library

This module is part of the AliCloud ROS Cloud Development Kit (ROS CDK) project.

```python
import * as CLOUDSTORAGEGATEWAY from '@alicloud/ros-cdk-cloudstoragegateway';
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_cloudstoragegateway.RosStorageBundle.attr_create_time
documentation: :Attribute: CreateTime: Create a gateway cluster timestamp.

methods.name: ros_cdk_cloudstoragegateway.RosStorageBundle.attr_description
documentation: :Attribute: Description: Gateway cluster description.

methods.name: ros_cdk_cloudstoragegateway.RosStorageBundle.attr_storage_bundle_id
documentation: :Attribute: StorageBundleId: The ID of the gateway cluster.

methods.name: ros_cdk_cloudstoragegateway.RosStorageBundle.attr_storage_bundle_name
documentation: :Attribute: StorageBundleName: Gateway cluster name.

methods.name: ros_cdk_cloudstoragegateway.RosStorageBundle.storage_bundle_name
documentation: :Property: storageBundleName: The name of the gateway cluster. The name must be 1 to 60 characters in length and can contain letters, digits, periods (.), underscores (_), and hyphens (-). It must start with a letter.

methods.name: ros_cdk_cloudstoragegateway.RosStorageBundle.description
documentation: :Property: description: The description of the gateway cluster. The description must be 0 to 128 characters in length.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::CloudStorageGateway::StorageBundle`, which is used to create a gateway cluster.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `StorageBundle` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-cloudstoragegateway-storagebundle>

documentation: Attribute StorageBundleName: Gateway cluster name.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::CloudStorageGateway::StorageBundle`, which is used to create a gateway cluster.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosStorageBundle\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-cloudstoragegateway-storagebundle>

methods.name: ros_cdk_cloudstoragegateway.StorageBundleProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `StorageBundle`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-cloudstoragegateway-storagebundle>

```
param storage_bundle_name

Property storageBundleName: The name of the gateway cluster. The name must be 1 to 60 characters in length and can contain letters, digits, periods (.), underscores (_), and hyphens (-). It must start with a letter.

param description

Property description: The description of the gateway cluster. The description must be 0 to 128 characters in length.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_cloudstoragegateway.datasource.RosStorageBundle.refresh_options
documentation:
:Property:

refreshOptions: The refresh strategy for the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Valid values:

- Never: Never refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
- Always: Always refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
Default is Never.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `DATASOURCE::CloudStorageGateway::StorageBundle`.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `StorageBundle` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-cloudstoragegateway-storagebundle>
